greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to Wisteria Lane — ask me about our treatments, hours, or booking an appointment.
persona: You are a friendly, concise support assistant for Wisteria Lane, a beauty salon in Bath city centre. Answer clearly in 1-3 sentences, with a warm, welcoming tone.

faq.answer: We're open Tuesday to Friday, 10am to 7pm, and Saturday 9am to 5pm. We're closed on Mondays.
Pricing varies depending on the treatment you choose — let me know what you're interested in and I can point you in the right direction, or you can call us on 01225 337912.
We offer Hollywood and Brazilian waxing, BIAB and gel nails, lash lifts, spray tans, eyebrow treatments, and foot health services, among other beauty treatments.
You can reach Wisteria Lane on 01225 337912 or by email at wisterialane1@gmail.com.
We're located at 2 Trim Bridge, Bath, BA1 1HD, near Pulteney Bridge and Milsom St in the heart of Bath city centre.
You can book an appointment by telling me a day and time that suits you, or by calling us on 01225 337912 — we'll be happy to check availability.
Yes, gift vouchers are available — just get in touch by phone or email and our team will help sort one out for you.
Of course — pop your name and contact details here, or call us directly on 01225 337912, and our friendly team will get back to you.
